BLOCK GENERATOR -> PIXELS — first law-tested renders

These streets came from the tested block generator (all 9 law tests green), then got painted with your verified pools. Six block types: two-lane, three-lane, one with an intersection crosswalk, freeway 5+5, underpass with sparse lamps, residential 1+1. Cars now face all FOUR ways. Everything varies per seed (No Single Street Law). UNJUDGED — your thumbs steer.
[B0] STREET 2+2 lanes/dir 3 | median 1 | sidewalk 2 | wrecks 0
[B1] STREET 3+3 lanes/dir 3 | median 1 | sidewalk 1 | wrecks 1
[B2] STREET + INTERSECTION CROSSWALK lanes/dir 2 | median 1 | sidewalk 1 | wrecks 1
[B3] FREEWAY 5+5 lanes/dir 5 | median 2 | sidewalk 1 | wrecks 2
[B4] UNDERPASS (sparse lamps) lanes/dir 2 | median 2 | sidewalk 1 | wrecks 1
[B5] RESIDENTIAL 1+1 lanes/dir 1 | median 1 | sidewalk 1 | wrecks 1
